pitchEn: An on-device watcher for any RSS/Atom feed or public JSON API you choose: it sends a local notification when a new entry appears or a keyword matches. Everything runs on the device with unlimited monitors, scheduled checks and change-diffing.
newFeaturesEn: First release: create unlimited feed and JSON monitors with keyword matching and on-schedule local alerts, all running entirely on your device.

dataHandling.notes: Fetches only the RSS/Atom or JSON sources the user enters (optionally via a user-supplied CORS proxy). Monitors, logs and settings are stored locally; no account, no cloud, no analytics. Local notifications only.

reviewerRemarksEn: No account or login is required. On first launch pick a language, tap through the onboarding, then grant the notification permission and add a monitor by pasting a public RSS/Atom feed URL or a JSON API URL. Use 'Check now' to fetch immediately; a match is written to the log and shown as a local notification. Internet is used only to download the source you entered.
